diagnosis.final_diagnosis: Maternally-inherited diabetes mellitus and deafness (MIDD) with A3243G transfer RNA mutation
diagnosis.differential_diagnosis: Mitochondrial encephalopathy, lactic acidosis, and stroke-like symptoms (MELAS)
diagnosis.diagnostic_reasoning: The diagnosis was confirmed by muscle biopsy showing ragged red fibers and the identification of the A3243G mutation. The patients presented with early onset diabetes mellitus, progressive hearing loss, and visual complaints, which are characteristic of MIDD. The absence of stroke-like episodes and the milder phenotype differentiated it from MELAS.
